pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates a README.txt that explicitly instructs the user with this Windows path
setup_task.sh script creates the backup at this path using cp or dd
export_result.sh evaluates the task by checking for the confirmation file at this exact path
The task description requires this exact text, and verifier.py verifies that 'successfully' or 'restored' are present in the confirmation file

privileged_info_summary: The active Lobby Track database backup is located at /home/ga/.wine/drive_c/LobbyTrackBackup/LobbyTrackDB_backup.mdb (Windows: C:\LobbyTrackBackup\LobbyTrackDB_backup.mdb). The task requires the creation of a confirmation file at /home/ga/.wine/drive_c/LobbyTrackBackup/restore_confirmation.txt containing the text 'Database restored successfully'. The backup file is generated synthetically if the environment database is empty.
